pr.title: Record: Int6 STE + SmearGate + Seq2048 + OrthoInit + RoPE50K + SWA/100 (mean val_bpb=1.1507)

output.summary: Int6 STE quantization trains a NorMuon+WD 9-layer model with SmearGate gating, wider MLP, Seq2048+RoPE50K, SWA/100, and sliding-window eval.
techniques: Int6 STE with NorMuon+decoupled WD for quant-aware training
SmearGate gating plus wider MLP within 16MB budget
Seq2048+RoPE50K context with SWA/100 and sliding-window evaluation
